benefits.description: Behavior changed to be more energetic. Does not feel tired after 10,000 steps. Energy levels more than before experiment and maintained.
Rest of depression disappeared. Optimistic about life. Life became more enjoyable.
Sleep problems disappeared. Slept 12 hours like in childhood. Sleep became normalized and clock-dependent. Sleep improved and never returned to old bad levels after 1 month.
Creativity levels increased by 3-4 times. Restored productivity as a painter, now spends 95% of time painting and creating. Desire to learn increased. New talent levels achieved.

protocol_notes: 64 years old participant. Had been using microdosing for depression prior to this trial. Effects on sleep normalized for 1 month, then sleepless behavior slowly returned but never to previous bad levels.
